title: Non-Invasive 40Hz Transcranial Vibration for Enhanced Glymphatic Clearance: A Pilot Study
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"3jcam","text":"This pilot study investigates the efficacy of 40Hz sinusoidal mechanical vibration applied to the bilateral Temporalis muscles to facilitate neuro-metabolic waste clearance via the glymphatic system. By monitoring salivary cortisol and heart rate variability (HRV), this research seeks to establish a non-pharmacological protocol for neuroprotection and accelerated post-surgical recovery.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"47ssr","text":"Safety Precautions: Participants with a history of epilepsy, recent head trauma, or metallic cranial implants are excluded. Stimulation is limited to 20 minutes to prevent over-stimulation. If vertigo occurs, cease stimulation immediately","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":19}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6m1fr","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5r94c","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"fhll9","text":"Warnings / Contraindications","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":28}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7poc9","text":"Epilepsy Warning: This protocol involves rhythmic 40Hz mechanical stimulation. It is strictly contraindicated for individuals with a history of generalized or focal epilepsy, as it may lower the seizure threshold.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":17}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1roul","text":"Cranial Integrity: Do not apply stimulation to individuals with recent head trauma, unhealed skull fractures, or those with implanted medical devices (e.g., Vagus Nerve Stimulators, DBS, or metallic plates).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":18}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b9da8","text":"Vertebrobasilar Insufficiency: If the participant experiences sudden vertigo, nausea, or nystagmus during the 40Hz application, the procedure must be terminated immediately.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":30}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dde0d","text":"Acoustic Sensitivity: Users with severe hyperacusis should use ear protection, as the mechanical vibration of the temporal bone may be perceived as an audible hum.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":21}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"90hln","text":"Custom 40Hz Piezoelectric Actuator Headband: Designed for focal contact with the bilateral Temporalis muscles.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":44}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"26v7s","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ch7bq","text":"Programmable Signal Generator: Capable of maintaining a stable 40Hz sinusoidal output.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":30}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5abjv","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ejn3n","text":"Salivary Cortisol Collection Kits (ELISA): For pre- and post-intervention biochemical analysis.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":42}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6f0g7","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6un83","text":"HRV Monitor: Clinical-grade wearable for real-time Heart Rate Variability tracking.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":12}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4tonh","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3fu10","text":"Digital Visual Analogue Scale (VAS): For recording subjective \"Brain Fog\" and stress levels.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":36}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Bushra Fatima
